title: Transiting through New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Transiting through New Zealand
Find out if you need a transit visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) if you are transiting through Auckland International Airport.
- Transiting through New Zealand to another country Check if you need a transit visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) to pass through New Zealand to another country.

## Transiting through New Zealand to another country
Check if you need a transit visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) to pass through New Zealand to another country.
- Transit visa waiver countries and territories Citizens of some countries and territories do not have to apply for a visa before transiting Auckland International Airport. They must request a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) instead.

## Transit visa waiver countries and territories
Citizens of some countries and territories do not have to apply for a visa before transiting Auckland International Airport. They must request a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) instead.
